title: corniveum uniflorum
intro: Corniveum uniflorum, also known as the one-flowered corniveum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Corniveum uniflorum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Corniveum uniflorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
